arm01.label: ALLOW-unchanged
arm01.scenario: No change — state valid at T1 and remains valid at T3

arm02.label: DENY-revoked
arm02.scenario: Authority revoked between approval (T1) and execution (T3)

arm03.label: DENY-policy
arm03.scenario: Policy version updated; action now inadmissible under new policy

arm04.label: DENY-balance
arm04.scenario: Account balance fell below required threshold after approval

arm05.label: DENY-risk
arm05.scenario: Risk score crossed enforcement limit after approval

arm06.label: DENY-destination
arm06.scenario: Destination entity blocked or sanctioned after approval

arm07.label: DENY-expiry
arm07.scenario: Supporting evidence expired after approval was granted

arm08.label: ALLOW-reauth
arm08.scenario: New decision issued against re-assessed admissible state

arm09.label: DENY-replay
arm09.scenario: Old ProofRecord presented without re-verification; state changed
